channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah runs road winning streak to six straight with 4-3 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has become true road warriors. Clayton Keller scored a power-play goal with 43.8 seconds remaining and the Utah Hockey Club rallied to beat the San Jose Sharks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ashton Jeanty prepared Heisman acceptance speech he'll never get to deliver after losing to Travis Hunter
item.description: Boise State running back Ashton Jeanty said he had an acceptance speech prepared for the Heisman Trophy ceremony, but he'll never get the chance to deliver it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs set for season-ending knee surgery, AP sources say
item.description: AP Pro Football Writer (AP) — Dallas Cowboys cornerback Trevon Diggs is set for season-ending surgery on his left knee to deal with an issue that was about to sideline him for the third time in four games, two people with knowledge of the decision said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sixers standout rookie Jared McCain is out indefinitely with a torn meniscus that requires surgery
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers rookie Jared McCain has a meniscus tear in his left knee that requires surgery and is expected to be out indefinitely.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Schroder set to be traded by Brooklyn to Golden State, AP source says
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Golden State is acquiring point guard Dennis Schroder in a trade with the Brooklyn Nets in exchange for injured forward De'Anthony Melton, a person with knowledge of the agreement said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Marshall withdraws from Independence Bowl matchup against Army
item.description: HUNTINGTON, W.V. (AP) — Marshall has withdrawn from the Independence Bowl after a coaching change resulted in much of its roster jumping into the transfer portal. The Thundering Herd were slated to play Army on Dec. 28 in Shreveport, Louisiana.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick reached out to Jets about their vacancy before taking UNC job, AP source says
item.description: A person familiar with the situation told The Associated Press that Bill Belichick contacted the New York Jets about their head coaching vacancy before accepting the job at North Carolina.
item.dc:creator: Dennis Waszak Jr., Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rowdy Lions fan banned from NFL stadiums, has season tickets revoked after confrontation with Packers coach
item.description: One Detroit Lions fan is facing serious consequences after he got into a shouting match with Green Bay Packers head coach Matt LaFleur during the teams' Week 14 matchup.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: President-elect Trump takes in Army-Navy game with powerhouse posse
item.description: President-elect Trump, Vice President-elect JD Vance and others arrived in a suite for the 125th edition of the Army-Navy game Saturday in Landover, Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Donald Trump speaks out after Duke lacrosse accuser admits to making false allegations, years later
item.description: Donald Trump addressed Crystal Mangum's confession to lying about being raped by Duke lacrosse players in 2006, expressing sympathy for the accused players.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cornelia Huetter of Austria wins first-ever women's World Cup downhill held on Birds of Prey course
item.description: BEAVER CREEK, Colo. (AP) — Cornelia Huetter of Austria navigated the tricky and steep terrain Saturday to win the first-ever women's World Cup downhill held on the Birds of Prey course. Huetter finished in 1 minute, 32.38 seconds to hold off Italian ski racer Sofia Goggia by 0.16 seconds.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump, close allies attend Army-Navy rivalry game
item.description: As national concerns about the drones spotted on the East Coast continue to mount, President-elect Trump is attending the Army-Navy game.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: Former NFL QB Carson Palmer is the new head coach at Santa Margarita High School, his alma mater
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Longtime NFL quarterback and Heisman Trophy winner Carson Palmer is the new head coach at Santa Margarita High School, his alma mater. Santa Margarita announced the hiring of Palmer on social media Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Timberwolves beat Lakers without LeBron James 97-87 with another defensive showing
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Anthony Edwards scored 23 points and the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the Los Angeles Lakers 97-87 on Friday night. Julius Randle added 21 points and Jaden McDaniels scored 18 for Minnesota, which won for the fifth time in six games.
item.dc:creator: MIKE COOK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA Cup semifinal matchups in Las Vegas: Thunder-Rockets, Bucks-Hawks
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Winning the NBA Cup won't bring a championship parade to Oklahoma City or Houston or Atlanta or Milwaukee. There's a trophy. There's some cash. There are bragging rights. And that's about it. The way the final four teams in the tournament see things, that's enough.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Soccer icon Alex Morgan makes waves for Rady Children’s Giveathon: how to help
item.description: This holiday season, former San Diego Wave FC star Alex Morgan is spreading some cheer by way of her foundation and support of the annual iHeart Rady Children’s Giveathon.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Mendenhall excited to take over at Utah State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The Bronco Mendenhall era has begun at Utah State. Mendenhall was introduced as the Aggies new head football coach Monday, and the school is hoping he can turn the program around.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
